snippet.title: LOL: Chi ride √® fuori | Aftershow
snippet.description:
Dalle battute meno aspettate e le performance senza senso agli sguardi in silenzio sofferente. C‚Äô√® un prima e un dopo ‚ÄúLOL: Chi ride fuori‚ÄĚ e adesso, √® il momento di scoprire come l‚Äôha vissuta l‚Äôintero cast. 
Special thanks a Fedez, Mara, Elio, Frank, Michela, Pintus, Lillo, Luca, Katia, Ciro, Caterina e Fru.

Casa di produzione: Don't Movie

7) Burrows, Malcolm, et al. "Mantises exchange angular momentum between three rotating body parts to jump precisely to targets." Current Biology 25.6 (2015): 786-789.
8) Rossoni, Sergio, and Jeremy E. Niven. "Prey speed influences the speed and structure of the raptorial strike of a ‚Äėsit-and-wait‚Äôpredator." Biology letters 16.5 (2020): 20200098.
9) https://www.nytimes.com/2020/05/14/science/praying-mantis-strike.html
10) Nyffeler, Martin, Michael R. Maxwell, and J. V. Remsen Jr. "Bird predation by praying mantises: a global perspective." The Wilson Journal of Ornithology 129.2 (2017): 331-344.
11) Birkhead, T. R., K. E. Lee, and P. Young. "Sexual cannibalism in the praying mantis Hierodula membranacea." Behaviour 106.1-2 (1988): 112-118.
12) Rilling, Susan, Horst Mittelstaedt, and K. D. Roeder. "Prey recognition in the praying mantis." Behaviour (1959): 164-184.

snippet.title: Rondo ‚Äď DUBAI | RONDO NON COPIA PIU NESSUNO? ( RAP / DRILL REACTION ) by Arcade Boyz
snippet.description:
gli Arcade Boyz reagiscono al nuovo singolo di RONDO dal titolo DUBAI ! 
guarda anche SHOW NO LOVE REACTION :  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nTtV5pkvook
Dopo aver messo 6 zeri nel conto solo vendendo cereali a 15‚ā¨ il giovane Rondo da Sosa √® pronto a conquistare anche gli Emirati Arabi Uniti.
Anche questa volta il pezzo √® pieno di fotta e scorre molto bene, ma come sempre a prevalere sono il perenne alone di confusione e i meme involontari che crea Rondo su s√© stesso.
Le frasi dette un po' senza pensarci rischiano di rovinare quello che in realt√† non √® un testo banalissimo, Rondo avrebbe bisogno di un aiuto a scrivere?
Per non farsi mancare nulla l'artista di San Siro sfrutta questa uscita per autoproclamarsi king della Drill, come prender√† questa dichiarazione colui che √® stato il king incontrastato per anni? 
Torner√† il beef tra i due?

#ArcadeBoyz #Rondo #Dubai

La canzone √® accompagnata da un videoclip diretto da Peter Marvu e Davide De Meo, girato per le strade di Dubai, il deserto, l‚Äôoceano del Golfo Persico e l‚Äôacquario del Dubai Mall.
Il vero nome di Rondo Da Sosa √® Mattia Barbieri, cresciuto nel quartiere periferico di San Siro, a Milano. A gennaio 2020, il rapper pubblica "Free Samy" con la label Real Music 4E e dopo le attenzioni generate dal suo debutto, rilascia il singolo "Leggenda".
Insieme a Vale Pain, Sacky, Keta, Neima Ezza e Kilimoney fa parte del collettivo RM4E, con cui pubblica il singolo "SEVEN 7oo" certificato disco d'oro.

snippet.title: Opinion - C'do te ndodhe me Ramen dhe Bashen? (27 Prill 2021)
snippet.description:
#Opinion | Emision politik live nga #BlendiFevziu n√ę #TvKlan #AleksanderFrangaj #BatonHaxhiu #ArmandShkullaku #ErlaMehilli #Pre√ßZogaj

Emisioni politik m√ę i ndjekur dhe m√ę i preferuar n√ę ekranet shqiptare. ‚ÄúOpinion‚ÄĚ vjen n√ę kat√ęr takime √ßdo jav√ę ‚Äď e h√ęn√ę, e mart√ę, e m√ęrkur√ę dhe takimi tradicional i t√ę enjtes mbr√ęma.

snippet.title: Perseverance Rover's Mastcam-Z Captures Ingenuity's Third Flight
snippet.description:
NASA‚Äôs Ingenuity Mars Helicopter takes off and lands in this video captured on April 25, 2021, by Mastcam-Z, an imager aboard NASA‚Äôs Perseverance Mars rover. As expected, the helicopter flew out of its field of vision while completing a flight plan that took it 164 feet (50 meters) downrange of the landing spot. Keep watching, the helicopter will return to stick the landing. Top speed for today's flight was about 2 meters per second, or about 4.5 miles-per-hour.

The Ingenuity Mars Helicopter was built by JPL, which also manages this technology demonstration project for NASA Headquarters. It is supported by NASA‚Äôs Science Mission Directorate, Aeronautics Research Mission Directorate, and Space Technology Mission Directorate. NASA‚Äôs Ames Research Center and Langley Research Center provided significant flight performance analysis and technical assistance during Ingenuity‚Äôs development.

A key objective for Perseverance‚Äôs mission on Mars is astrobiology, including the search for signs of ancient microbial life. The rover will characterize the planet‚Äôs geology and past climate, pave the way for human exploration of the Red Planet, and be the first mission to collect and cache Martian rock and regolith (broken rock and dust). 

Subsequent NASA missions, in cooperation with ESA (European Space Agency), would send spacecraft to Mars to collect these sealed samples from the surface and return them to Earth for in-depth analysis.

The Mars 2020 Perseverance mission is part of NASA‚Äôs Moon to Mars exploration approach, which includes Artemis missions to the Moon that will help prepare for human exploration of the Red Planet.

JPL, which is managed for NASA by Caltech in Pasadena, California, built and manages operations of the Perseverance rover.

For more about Perseverance:
-mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/
-nasa.gov/perseverance

Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech/ASU/MSSS

‚ÄúMANGIO TUTTI I PASTI DEI GENTLEMEN IN 20 MINUTI‚ÄĚ

Ed eccomi qua ragazzi questa settimana pronto per affrontare una Gentlemen challenge!

Dopo aver resistito alle avance culinarie dei miei compagni Gentlemen durante un‚Äôappetitosa cena dove questi tre ‚Äúpersonaggi‚ÄĚ hanno deciso di ordinare pizza, hamburger e carne con rinforzo di patatine, escludendomi da questo delizioso banchetto per via di una strana prova di resistenza inversa nella quale dovevo resistere appunto a queste leccornie evitando di cedere in tentazioni mentre loro nutrivano il loro piccolo appetito, ho deciso di prendermi una rivincita!

In questa challenge improvvisata ho deciso di ordinare tutti i pasti consumati dai Gentlemen in questa deliziosa cena e di smantellarli tutti in meno di venti minuti (ovvero il tempo impiegato da quest‚Äôultimi per terminare questo convito)

In questa rivincita considerando che ho indossato la mia divisa da Gentlemen, mi sar√≤ limitato a gustare queste prelibatezze lasciando cos√¨ una piccola possibilit√† di vittoria agli altri, o il lato Hungry avr√† preso il sopravvento facendomi spazzolare i loro pasti prima dello scadere del tempo pattuito!?

Ovviamente lo scoprirete solo gustandovi un nuovo episodio di questa nuova collaborazione con i GENTLEMEN!

Se ti √® piaciuto il video come sempre iscriviti al mio canale e condividi!!!

Noi ci vediamo al prossimo video... e nel frattempo...
STAY FIT!! &
STAY HUNGRY!!

snippet.title: Marco Werner takes out Jean Alesi after thrilling battle for first in Monaco Historique 2021!
snippet.description:
SUBSCRIBE ‚Ėļ http://bit.ly/SubscribeSkyF1
There was drama at the Monaco Historique where veteran driver Jean Alesi was taken out by Marco Werner. Alesi was leading the 1973-76 F1 era car race and holding off a determined second placed Werner. But with just three laps remaining Werner's Lotus 77 ran into the back Alesi's Ferrari 312B3, ending Alesi's race and putting Werner into the lead.

snippet.title: India overwhelmed by world‚Äôs worst Covid crisis - BBC News
snippet.description:
International help is being pledged for India as it battles a ferocious second wave of coronavirus, described by Prime Minister Narendra Modi as a storm that has shaken the nation.

Almost 350,000 new infections were recorded in India in the latest 24 hour period - a record number for the fourth day in a row. 

As the epidemic continues to grow hospitals are under intolerable pressure - with shortages of beds and critical supplies including oxygen. 

Mishal Husain presents BBC News at Ten reporting by Yogita Limaye in Delhi and diplomatic correspondent Paul Adams. 

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

snippet.title: Oscar 2021 - Ecco tutti i vincitori di una strana serata
snippet.description:
Oscar 2021 - Ecco tutti i vincitori di una strana serata


Si √® conclusa poche ore fa una Notte degli Oscar decisamente anomala. Ovviamente non parliamo solo dell‚Äôeccezionalit√† dovuta alla pandemia, che ha reso la cerimonia pi√Ļ intima, con molti meno invitati e con qualche ospite in collegamento da altre parti del mondo.

L‚ÄôAcademy ha optato per una serata molto sobria, per niente spettacolare, ma che si √® rivelata non solo noiosa ma a tratti completamente assurda per l‚Äôordine con cui sono stati assegnati i premi.

Il premio alla regia, di solito il penultimo della serata, √® stato assegnato a poco meno di met√† cerimonia, mentre il premio pi√Ļ importante e atteso, quello al miglior film, che da sempre chiude la premiazione √® stato assegnato prima dei due premi alla migliore attrice e al miglior attore. Una scelta scellerata che di fatto ha tolto ogni mordente allo spettacolo.
Premi che da una parte hanno rispettato molti pronostici, ma che hanno regalato anche qualche grande sorpresa.

Scopriamo tutto nel dettaglio nel nostro riepilogo in cui vi raccontiamo tutti i vincitori di questa stramba notte degli Oscar 2021.


Testo: Giuseppe Grossi
Voce e montaggio: Gabriele Scarcelli

snippet.title: India's COVID death toll may be much higher than the officially recorded | DW News
snippet.description:
During the week between April 18 and 25, India reported 2.24 million new coronavirus cases, the highest number recorded by any country in a seven-day period. It also logged 16,257 deaths, almost double the 8,588 deaths recorded the previous week, according to Health Ministry data. India has been logging global daily records of over 300,000 cases for the last five days. The country saw 352,991 daily new infections and 2,812 COVID-related deaths in the past 24 hours. Altogether, 195,123 people have died while 17.3 million people have been infected with the virus in India. These numbers are staggering, but experts and epidemiological modelers believe that the real number of COVID fatalities could be much higher than the deaths recorded by health departments nationwide. "The distressing scenes of patients dying in ambulances and bodies burning on pyres outside crematoriums and even on pavements across cities and towns clearly show that the tragedy is far greater," Anoop Saraya, a private doctor, told DW.

snippet.title: Jamil, il re delle TN
snippet.description:
Le TN sono ormai un universo autonomo, un mondo noto non solo agli appassionati di sneakers ma a tutti coloro che percorrono le strade delle citt√† europee. Poche persone possono essere identificate nello stile TN quanto Jamil. Il rapper di Verona ha costantemente addosso Nike Tn,¬†le mostra nei video musicali e le ha pure omaggiate in canzoni come "Scarpe da Pusher" e "Come la Francia". Fino ad essere diventato un testimonial per Foot Locker. Abbiamo incontrato Jamil per parlare del suo stile, della sua passione per le TN, dell'essere un artista indipendente nel 2021 e molto altro. 

Segui Outpump:

Instagram: https://bit.ly/2RHEsMb‚Äč‚Äč
Youtube: https://bit.ly/2R1YyeZ‚Äč‚Äč
Sito: https://bit.ly/2FHbk1w

snippet.title: BAO Disney Pixar Official Animation Short Clip | Incredibles 2 Bonus (2018) Animation Adventure HD
snippet.description:
Follow US on Social Media!
‚Ėļ Instagram: https://instagram.com/aniboxtraileraccess/
‚Ėļ Twitter: https://twitter.com/AniBox_Access

Bao is a 2018 American computer-animated short film written and directed by Domee Shi and produced by Pixar Animation Studios. It was released with Incredibles 2 on June 15, 2018. The film is about an aging and lonely Chinese-Canadian mother, suffering from empty nest syndrome, who receives an unexpected second chance at motherhood when she makes a steamed bun (baozi) that comes to life. The film won the Oscar for the Best Animated Short Film at the 91st Academy Awards.

A Chinese-Canadian woman suffering from empty nest syndrome gets a second shot at motherhood when one of her handmade dumplings comes alive.

¬© 2018 The Walt Disney Company. | All Rights Reserved.

snippet.title: Man jumps feet-first into moving car through window to stop dangerous driver in Albania
snippet.description:
A man has jumped through the window of a moving car to stop an erratic and dangerous driver in the main square of Albania's capital, Tirana. The footage showed a damaged vehicle being dangerously driven in Skanderbeg Square as people tried to stop it. Police said the 32-year-old driver had previously crashed three other cars in other parts of the city. The video was captured by dozens of cameras set up in Skanderbeg Square to report on the general election in Albania

snippet.title: Olivia Rodrigo Sings Taylor Swift, No Doubt & "drivers license" in a Game of Song Association | ELLE
snippet.description:
May cover star #OliviaRodrigo is taking the wheel on #SongAssociation! The talented newcomer has become one of *the* biggest pop stars in the world, making history as both of her debut smash hits, #driverslicense and #dejavu, sit at the top of the charts. Tune in on this episode as she sings #TaylorSwift, dishes on her dream collaboration, her first concert, and the song she wishes she wrote. snippet.title: Rimonta clamorosa del Lille: Lione-Lille 2-3 | Ligue 1 | DAZN Highlights
snippet.description:
Un match pieno di emozioni quello andato in scena al Parc OL. Il Lione parte subito forte portandosi sul 2-0, ma la grinta del Lille e dell'intramontabile Burak YńĪlmaz ribaltano totalmente il match: la doppietta del turco e il gol di David fissano il punteggio sul 2-3 finale.
A 4 giornate dal termine il Lille difende la vetta in Ligue 1: +1 sul PSG e +2 sul Monaco.

Segui la Ligue1 Uber Eats su DAZN: http://bit.ly/DAZN_Ligue1

snippet.title: Theo Hernandez (Milan) e Zoe Cristofoli: ecco la loro super casa | Episodio 11 | MTV Cribs Italia
snippet.description:
Il meglio della puntata. Alla scoperta della nuova casa della coppia formata dal giocatore del Milan Theo Hernandez e dalla modella e influencer Zoe Cristofoli, tra piscine coperte, una sala giochi, fuoristrada e collezioni di maglie da calcio... Non perdere MTV Cribs Italia, lo show che ti porta nelle case dei vip, mercoled√¨ alle 21:10 su MTV (Sky 130) e in streaming su NOW #MTVCribs Italia

Rimani aggiornato con tutte le novit√† sul canale: https://bit.ly/2MsIlPa

Dal 17 marzo ogni mercoled√¨ alle 21:10 su MTV (Sky 130) e in streaming su NOW #MTVCribs Italia

snippet.title: Chupke Chupke | Episode 14 | HUM TV Drama | 27 April 2021
snippet.description:
Chupke Chupke, Episode 14, Official HD Video - 27 April 2021

'Chupke Chupke' is the much-needed comic respite coming to your TV screens this Ramazan. This long-awaited Danish Nawaz directorial is an intertwined story of two families and promises to be a light romantic comedy play with a difference that will make you laugh out loud with your whole family. The plot of the play revolves around Faaz and Hadi, with Faaz searching for the perfect girl whereas the latter is struggling not only with his job but his bad luck with marriage proposals. What follows is a roller-coaster ride with the perfect blend of family drama, tense, funny and exciting situations.

Starring:
Osman Khalid Butt, Ayeza Khan, Arslan Naseer (of Comics by Arslan fame), Aymen Saleem, Mani, Mira Sethi, Qavi Khan, Ali Safina, Tarah Mahmood, Farhan Ally Agha, Asma Abbas, Sheheryar Zaidi, Salma Asim, Hira Soomro, Uzma Beg, Ayesha Mirza, Abdul Hadi, Areesha

Writer: Saima Akram Chaudhry

Director:  Danish Nawaz

Producer: Momina Duraid Productions

#HUMTV #ChupkeChupke #OsmanKhalidButt #AyezaKhan #ArslanNaseer #AymenSaleem #Mani #MiraSethi #QaviKhan #AliSafina #TarahMahmood #FarhanAllyAgha #AsmaAbbas #DanishNawaz

#CecchiPaone insulta il #ristoratore: "Lei faccia la pasta alle vongole"
"Lei di economia non capisce nulla, faccia la pasta alle vongole". Cecchi Paone, con atteggiamento snob e saccente, denigra un ristoratore che stava solo spiegando le difficolt√† che stanno vivendo i tanti #lavoratori e imprenditori. L'Italia che produce va ascoltata e sostenuta, non umiliata. Noi stiamo dalla parte di chi si rimbocca le maniche, non di chi apre la bocca solo per darle fiato.

snippet.description:
After success of "Kurmaiyan", Winner‚Äôs Film presents New Punjabi Movie 2021 Tu Mera Ki Lagda with Harjit Harman, Yograj Singh, Shefali Sharma, Gurmeet Saajan, Prince KJ Singh in lead & Ravinder Grewal, Jaspinder Cheema as Spl. Enjoy this Latest Punjabi Movies 2021 Full Movie. Other cast includes Nisha Bano, Jashjit Gosha, Narinder Nina, Nita Tubharbhan, Rohit Dhal, Harpal Singh and Hit songs are sung by R Nait, Harjit Harman, Ninja, Sudesh Kumari, Shipra Goyal. Film is Directed by Manjeet Tony & Gurmeet Saajan. 


Lead Cast: Harjit Harman, Yograj Singh, Shefali Sharma, Gurmeet Saajan, Gurpreet Bhangu, Prince KJ Singh, Nisha Bano, Chacha Bishna, Mintu jatt, Parveen Akhtar, Jashjit Gosha, Bhola Layalpuria, Satwant Kaur, Parm Sidhu, Roop Kaur Sandhu, Mini Mehar mital, Narinder Nina, Nita Tubharbhan, Rohit Dhal, Harpal Singh

Special Apperance: Ravinder Grewal, Jaspinder Cheema

Synopsis of ‚ÄúTu Mera Ki Lagda‚ÄĚ

Manjot (Harjit Harman) and Sarbi (Shefali Sharma) meets in a marriage and they both started loving each other. The love affair reaches to marriage but the parents of Sarbi do not want to marry their daughter to a rich family. Because there elder daughter (Jaspreet Kaur) marry herself to a rich guy Harjot (Ravinder Grewal) on her own terms.

But the parents of Harjot did not accept their relationship. Parents of Sarbi don‚Äôt want to face again what they saw happening with their elder daughter.

Further, the story goes through its twisting turns to show, whether Manjot and Sarbi would be able to meet, would their families be united.

all these questions are answered in an entertaining way in the film ‚ÄúTu Mera Ki Lagda‚ÄĚ

snippet.title: THE CONJURING: PER ORDINE DEL DIAVOLO ‚Äď Trailer Ufficiale Italiano
snippet.description:
Una storia vera, basata sui casi di Ed e Lorraine Warren. 
#TheConjuring: Per Ordine Del Diavolo, dal 3 giugno al cinema.

"The Conjuring: Per Ordine Del Diavolo" narra un'agghiacciante storia di terrore, 
omicidio e male oscuro, che ha sconvolto persino gli investigatori del paranormale Ed e Lorraine Warren. Uno dei casi pi√Ļ sensazionali da loro affrontati, inizia con la lotta per l'anima di un ragazzo, che ha portato i due demonologi a cose mai viste prima, segnando la prima volta nella storia degli Stati Uniti in cui un sospetto omicida avrebbe reclamato la sua possessione demoniaca come difesa.

Vera Farmiga e Patrick Wilson tornano a recitare nei panni di Lorraine e Ed Warren, sotto la direzione di Michael Chaves ("La Llorona ‚Äď le lacrime del male"). Fanno parte del cast del film Ruairi O'Connor ("The Spanish Princess" di Starz), Sarah Catherine Hook ("Monsterland" di Hulu) e Julian Hilliard (le serie "Penny Dreadful: City of Angels" e "Hill House").

"The Conjuring: Per Ordine Del Diavolo" √® prodotto da James Wan e Peter Safran, che hanno gi√† collaborato a tutti i film dell'universo di "The Conjuring". Hayes. I produttori esecutivi sono Richard Brener, Dave Neustadter, Victoria Palmeri, Michael Clear, Judson Scott e Michelle Morrissey.

snippet.description:
Finalmente ci siamo, inizia il primo week end di gara al Mugello in sella al Ducatone V4R del team Barni!
Le aspettative su di me e il team sono altissime, la pressione √® tanta, ma in ogni caso non vedevo l'ora di poter dimostrare la mia vera forza.

snippet.title: Oscars 2021: Anthony Hopkins' belated acceptance speech from Wales pays tribute to Chadwick Boseman
snippet.description:
Anthony Hopkins has issued an acceptance speech after winning the Best Actor award at the Oscars.

The 83-year-old Welshman was not in LA or at the London ceremony to pick up his prize and he did not appear by video link to give an acceptance speech. However, he has now posted a video on his Instagram account.

Read more here: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/news/2021/04/26/oscars-2021-winners-list-academy-awards-anthony-hopkins/

snippet.title: Singaporean in London attacked, saved by livestreamer
snippet.description:
Singaporean student Raymond Hing, 21, is seen being assaulted in real-time in London. 

The attack was recorded by YouTuber ‚ÄúSherwin‚ÄĚ, who had been doing a livestream. Sherwin‚Äôs video shows him rushing to the aid of Mr Hing, shouting repeatedly at the attacker to ‚ÄúLeave him alone!‚ÄĚ

The attacker makes a lunge for Mr Hing‚Äôs bicycle, before running away.

snippet.title: Crew-2 Mission | Launch
snippet.description:
SpaceX and NASA are targeting Friday, April 23 for Falcon 9‚Äôs launch of Dragon‚Äôs second six-month operational crew mission (Crew-2) to the International Space Station (ISS) from historic Launch Complex 39A (LC-39A) at NASA‚Äôs Kennedy Space Center in Florida. The instantaneous launch window opens at 5:49 a.m. EDT, 9:49 UTC, with a backup opportunity available on Monday, April 26 at 4:38 a.m. EDT, 8:38 UTC. 

Following stage separation, Falcon 9‚Äôs first stage will land on the ‚ÄúOf Course I Still Love You‚ÄĚ droneship, which will be stationed in the Atlantic Ocean. On Saturday, April 24, at approximately 5:10 a.m. EDT, 9:10 UTC, Dragon is expected to autonomously dock with the International Space Station.

This is the first human spaceflight mission to fly astronauts on a flight-proven Falcon 9 and Dragon. The Falcon 9 first stage supporting this mission previously launched the Crew-1 mission in November 2020 and the Dragon spacecraft previously flew Robert Behnken and Douglas Hurley to and from the International Space Station during SpaceX‚Äôs Demo-2 mission in 2020. 

The webcast will go live approximately 4 hours ahead of launch.
